はっ！ せいっ！ とぉっ！ ……ふぅ。<br>司令官、今日の訓練はここまでにした:
Ha! Yah! Hah! ...*sigh*.
Commander, I'd like to end today's training here.
あの……司令官。１つ、ご相談してもよろしいでしょうか。<br>最近、他の兵士の方:
Um... Commander, may I ask for your advice? Lately, for some reason,
I haven't been able to make eye contact with the other soldiers...
私が剣を振るうと、皆さんが一斉にこちらを見るのですが、<br>私が振り返ると、み:
When I swing my sword, they all look at me at once, but when I turn
back, they hurriedly avert their eyes...
はぁ……絶対、この制服のせいですよね？ きっと……<br>私は動きやすくていいの:
*sigh*... It's definitely this uniform, isn't it? I'm sure...
It's easy to move in, but it might interfere with others' training.
邪魔ではなく、みんなにとっての『目の保養』……！？<br>え～っと、それって、ど:
Not a hindrance, but 'eye candy' for everyone...! Umm... what does
